Intelligence Access · ZA-DIVERGENT

Access Tiers

The full bulletin is free and open. Pro features are in development — register interest to be notified when they launch.

Current
Public Bulletin
Free
No account required · full access
  • All signals — full archive
  • Signal map with geo-tagging & clustering
  • Entity graph visualization
  • All analyst articles
  • Entity directory & full profiles
  • Full case evidence chains
  • Complete entity dossiers
  • SAFLII court record integration
  • MiniSearch across all content
  • Watchlist (localStorage)
You have full access

Pro Intelligence
TBD
Pricing announced at launch
  • Everything in Free, plus:
  • API feed (pro-feed.json) — machine-readable signal data
  • Daily intelligence digest to email
  • Custom alert rules (stream + keyword filters)
  • Priority signal notifications
  • Additional Pro features TBD

Frequently Asked Questions
What is ZA-DIVERGENT?
An open-source intelligence bulletin covering South Africa and the surrounding region. Signals are collected, scored, and published by the FORGE OSINT engine. All source material is publicly available.
Is all the content really free?
Yes. The full bulletin — all signals, cases, entity profiles, court records, map, and graph — is free with no account required. Pro will add automation features (API feeds, email digests, custom alerts) for power users when it launches.
When does Pro launch?
We're still defining which features belong in the Pro tier. Register your email above and we'll notify you when it's ready. No spam, just one announcement.
How can I support this project now?
Use the "Support Independent OSINT" button in the footer. Every contribution helps keep the bulletin running and the data pipeline active.
◯
Simulation Mode
In live mode, Paystack's secure checkout would open here. Your card would be charged R49.00 via Paystack (SA payment gateway).
